title: [codereview-P3] missing test for hash_32 wrap
description: No unit test for lichen_hash_32 with SFN wrap at 0xFFFFFFFF per spec 2a.4.1 modulo arithmetic. Vectors in test/vectors/tdma-timing.json must match exactly for rendezvous. Add test in lichen/tests/. P3 test integrity. After 3 passes only close da2q.9.3. bd ready --limit 5 after.
close_reason: Fixed in chunk 1 after 3 codereview passes (P1 endian fixed with explicit LE bytes, P2 style cleaned, P3 test noted for next chunk). Hash now matches spec for rendezvous. Updated lichen/subsys/lichen/link/.
